name: zerogpt-codex-plugin
description: A Playwright-powered ZeroGPT CLI packaged as a Codex plugin skill.

scripts.check: node --check bin/zerogpt.js && node --check src/zerogpt.js && node --check src/line-map.js && node --check src/highlights.js
scripts.smoke: node ./bin/zerogpt.js --text "This is a short human-written sample for testing the detector automation. It contains ordinary prose and should be enough to exercise the workflow." --compact
